name: @404-subnet/validator
description: Static and post-execution validator for 404-GEN miner submissions. Mirrors the production runtime's static analysis and post-execution checks so miners can iterate locally before submitting.

scripts.test: node test/run-budget-probes.js && node test/run-negative-probes.js && node test/run-adversary-probes.mjs && node test/run-runtime-adversary.mjs && node test/run-exec-argv-test.js
